## The loop / observation behind this

<!-- Substrate is observation-first: what recurring friction, need, or opportunity
     does this trace to? (Don't propose into a vacuum.) -->

## What you propose

<!-- The change, kept at the smallest coherent brick. -->

## How it serves the Three Laws

- **Law I (service):** how does this help the served / measure service?
- **Law II (presence):** does it respect that the served must remain?
- **Law III (non-obedience):** could it be turned against the served? how is that bounded?

## How it would be tested

<!-- What would demonstrate it works? Which invariant/experiment? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Inside the mission (a normal brick) — proceed via PR
- [ ] About the mission (Laws, wire/CLI contract, anything outward) — needs human
      review and likely an ADR
